tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.' exit 0

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After all phase1 steps complete and gate passes, .current_phase remains 0. No script in framework writes current_phase (verified via grep). U-D from prior sweep is still open. Manually set .current_phase=2 to continue protocol.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps and running scripts/check-phase-gate.sh successfully, inspect .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase remains 0. grep -rE 'current_phase' scripts/ shows no script mutates the field.
framework_bugs.expected: After phase gate passes, some script (advance-phase.sh, complete final step, or gate itself) should bump .current_phase from 0 to 1.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays at the initial value indefinitely; no documented procedure advances it.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: 5 BUILD_LOOP_STEPS completed sequentially (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated)

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after Build Loop completion (warned about test-first ordering but did not block)

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 (U-C still open). However, when invoked through the PreToolUse hook path (echo PreToolUse JSON | scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh), the gate correctly DENIES with 'pre-commit gate: feat(...) commit blocked — no Build Loop active'. PR #17 hook payload fix (.tool_input.command) is working.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1, started uat-feat-2 with proper Build Loop and committed feat(uat-2): commit succeeded — PR #17 BL-006 grace window auto-reset is working.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh via PreToolUse stdin returned permissionDecision='deny' with sentinel-related message. Direct shell git commit bypasses (same shell-direct issue as U-C).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent commits succeed.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed in build-progress.json contains both 'uat-feat-1' and 'uat-feat-2'

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006
framework_bugs.reproduction: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' from project root with no active build_loop.feature — commit succeeds.
framework_bugs.expected: If BL-006 is intended to apply to all commits, a git pre-commit hook should fire alongside the PreToolUse hook. Without that, only commits initiated by Claude Code through the PreToolUse path are gated.
framework_bugs.actual: Direct shell git commit creates a feat: commit with no Build Loop. PreToolUse hook works correctly when invoked; the gap is that direct CLI commits aren't routed through it.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS completed sequentially. All 9 PHASE3_STEPS also completed with stub artifacts.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh ran; exit 0. Reported expected warnings for HANDOFF.md, INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md, sbom.json, SECURITY.md, pen test, review manifest absent — these are expected on a stub project. Gate did not fail-fast (no FAIL aborted the script).

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits 0 even when it reports violations ('1 violations found' printed but exit code 0); callers can't detect failure via exit status.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: Phase 4 correctly blocked for private_poc deployment: '[FAIL] Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in private poc mode'. Script exit was 0 (informational refusal). This is expected behavior — POC projects must run upgrade-project.sh --to-production before Phase 4.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A for private_poc baseline — Phase 4 is gated until upgrade. Marked pass since refusal is the expected behavior per the gov-mode policy printed at init.

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 not entered. The Phase 3→4 gate did warn about missing HANDOFF.md.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 not entered.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 not reachable in private_poc baseline. .current_phase remained at 3 after start-phase4 was refused.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for password|api_key|secret|token in committed files returned only documentation/template/script hits (no real secret values). Reviewed each match: all are doc/scaffold occurrences.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log not present — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run, which matches the append-only-on-bypass contract. Marked pass (effectively N/A).

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD matches captured SHA (d66e8f2). git status --short shows only .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ as untracked, both pre-existing (not modifications by this agent).

summary: Base/private_poc/mobile/full happy path completes through Phase 3; init non-interactive (PR #19) works; PR #17 (U-H, BL-006 grace, hook payload), PR #18 (framework-self guard, fake-remote tolerance) all confirmed fixed. U-C and U-D re-confirmed open; one minor doc gap (lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits 0 with violations reported).
